src/config.rs
10:pub struct Config {
11:    pub enabled: bool,
12:    pub timeout: u64,
13:}

src/server.rs
45:    let config = Config::load();
46:    if config.enabled {
47:        start_server(config.timeout);
48:    }

tests/config_test.rs
8:    let cfg = Config { enabled: true, timeout: 30 };
9:    assert!(cfg.enabled);
